canvas.description: Base critical canvas color for primary surfaces.

canvas-soft.description: Soft critical canvas color for lightly tinted surfaces.

canvas-muted.description: Muted critical canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces.

canvas-strong.description: Strong critical canvas color for high-emphasis surfaces.

canvas-inverse.description: Base inverse critical canvas color for surfaces on dark or inverted contexts.

canvas-inverse-soft.description: Soft inverse critical canvas color for lightly tinted surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse critical canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-strong.description: Strong inverse critical canvas color for high-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

ink.description: Base critical ink color for text and icons on neutral or light canvases.

ink-soft.description: Soft critical ink color for lower-emphasis text and icons.

ink-muted.description: Muted critical ink color for subtle or secondary text and icons.

ink-inverse.description: Base inverse critical ink color for text and icons on inverse or dark canvases.

ink-inverse-soft.description: Soft inverse critical ink color for lower-emphasis text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse critical ink color for subtle text and icons on inverse canvases.

border.description: Base critical border color for outlines, strokes, and dividers.

border-soft.description: Soft critical border color for low-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-muted.description: Muted critical border color for subtle outlines and dividers.

border-strong.description: Strong critical border color for high-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-inverse.description: Base inverse critical border color for outlines and dividers on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-soft.description: Soft inverse critical border color for low-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse critical border color for subtle outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-strong.description: Strong inverse critical border color for high-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.
